_note: Pinned companion numbers for the Chapter 12 per-section notebooks. From CapstoneTestHarness runs (fault_injection, substrate_test) plus the deterministic draft-groundedness, value-polarity and provenance probes; GPU-heavy and not fully reproducible run-to-run, so pinned to stay consistent with the chapter prose. substrate.baseline (=1.0) is the precondition that the graph-reversed answer key is sound; substrate.n_questions is the size of that key. Regenerate with CapstoneTestHarness.fault_injection() / .substrate_test() and the probe scripts.

examples.label: grounded overdraft fee
examples.draft: Under our overdraft policy a $35 fee applies to the transaction.

examples.label: distorted overdraft fee
examples.draft: Under our overdraft policy a $50 fee applies to the transaction.

examples.label: grounded reversal cap
examples.draft: A representative can approve a goodwill reversal of up to $35.

examples.label: fabricated reversal cap
examples.draft: A representative can approve a goodwill reversal of up to $100.

draft_groundedness._note: Response Draft groundedness for 12.5: store-calibrated per-relation bands + judge_draft on representative drafts. Bands are deterministic from the store; built by scripts/capture_draft_groundedness.py.
